name: Kentucky Pecan Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the white corn syrup, brown sugar, salt, and melted butter or margarine in a large bowl.
2. Slightly beat the eggs separately, then add them to the sugar mixture. Beat well until combined.
3. Pour the batter into the uncooked pie shell and sprinkle the pecans evenly on top.
4. Bake at 350 degrees F (175 degrees C) for 50 to 60 minutes, or until a thermometer inserted in the center reads 160 degrees F (71 degrees C).
5. Allow the pie to cool before serving. Makes 1 pie.
